016package org.consensusj.jsonrpc.internal;
017
018import com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonGenerator;
019import com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException;
020import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonSerializer;
021import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.SerializerProvider;
022
023import java.io.IOException;
024import java.util.regex.Pattern;
025
026/**
027 * If string is an integer (valid long) serialize as Number, else serialize as String
028 */
029public class NumberStringSerializer extends JsonSerializer<String> {
030    private static final Pattern numberRegEx = Pattern.compile("^-?\\d+$");
031
032    @Override
033    public void serialize(String numberOrString, JsonGenerator jsonGenerator,
034                          SerializerProvider serializerProvider)
035            throws IOException, JsonProcessingException {
036
037        if (numberRegEx.matcher(numberOrString).matches()) {
038            try {
039                jsonGenerator.writeNumber(Long.parseLong(numberOrString));
040                return;
041            } catch (NumberFormatException ignored) {}
042        }
043        jsonGenerator.writeString(numberOrString);
044    }
045}
